import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { useSelector } from 'react-redux'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { formatPrice } from '../utils/billing'; import { SERVICES_DB } from '../utils/database'; import '../styles/Reservations.css'; const Reservations = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const { isAuthenticated } = useSelector(state => state.auth); const { invoices } = useSelector(state => state.invoices); const [selectedInvoice, setSelectedInvoice] = useState(null); const [showInvoiceModal, setShowInvoiceModal] = useState(false); const [selectedTreatment, setSelectedTreatment] = useState(null); const [showTreatmentModal, setShowTreatmentModal] = useState(false); if (!isAuthenticated) { return (

Connexion requise

Veuillez vous connecter pour voir vos réservations

); } const handleViewInvoice = (invoice) => { setSelectedInvoice(invoice); setShowInvoiceModal(true); }; const handleViewTreatmentDetails = (item) => { // Récupérer les détails complets du service depuis la base de données const fullServiceData = SERVICES_DB.find(s => s.id === item.id || s.name === item.name); setSelectedTreatment(fullServiceData || item); setShowTreatmentModal(true); }; const getStatusLabel = (status) => { const labels = { 'pending': 'En attente', 'paid': 'Payé', 'cancelled': 'Annulé' }; return labels[status] || status; }; return (
Mes Rendez-vous

Mes réservations

Consultez et gérez vos rendez-vous à venir

{invoices.length === 0 ? (
📅

Aucune réservation

Vous n'avez pas encore de réservation

) : (
{invoices.map(invoice => (

Facture {invoice.invoiceNumber}

{getStatusLabel(invoice.status)}
📅 Date: {new Date(invoice.date).toLocaleDateString('fr-FR')}
👤 Patient: {invoice.user.name}
📋 Services: {invoice.items.length} service(s)

Services réservés:

{invoice.items.map((item, index) => (
{item.icon || '🦷'} {item.name} × {item.quantity} {formatPrice(item.subtotal)}
⏱️ {item.duration} 📋 {item.category}
))}
Sous-total HT: {formatPrice(invoice.subtotal)}
TVA (20%): {formatPrice(invoice.tax)}
{invoice.discount > 0 && (
Remise ({invoice.discountPercent}%): -{formatPrice(invoice.discount)}
)}
Total TTC: {formatPrice(invoice.total)}
))}
)}
{/* Modal Facture */} {showInvoiceModal && selectedInvoice && (
setShowInvoiceModal(false)}>
e.stopPropagation()}>

Facture Détaillée

N° de facture {selectedInvoice.invoiceNumber}
Date {new Date(selectedInvoice.date).toLocaleDateString('fr-FR')}
Patient {selectedInvoice.user.name}
Email {selectedInvoice.user.email}
Téléphone {selectedInvoice.user.phone}
Sous-total HT {formatPrice(selectedInvoice.subtotal)}
TVA (20%) {formatPrice(selectedInvoice.tax)}
{selectedInvoice.discount > 0 && (
Remise -{formatPrice(selectedInvoice.discount)}
)}
Total TTC {formatPrice(selectedInvoice.total)}
)} {/* Modal Détails Traitement */} {showTreatmentModal && selectedTreatment && (
setShowTreatmentModal(false)}>
e.stopPropagation()}>
{selectedTreatment.icon || '🦷'}

{selectedTreatment.name}

Catégorie : {selectedTreatment.category}

{selectedTreatment.description}

⏱️

Durée

{selectedTreatment.duration}

💰

Tarif

{selectedTreatment.price}€

{selectedTreatment.details && ( <> {selectedTreatment.details.included && (

✓ Inclus dans le traitement

    {selectedTreatment.details.included.map((item, index) => (
  • {item}
    • ))}
)}
{selectedTreatment.details.procedure && (
🔬

Procédure

{selectedTreatment.details.procedure}

)} {selectedTreatment.details.anesthesia && (
💉

Anesthésie

{selectedTreatment.details.anesthesia}

)} {selectedTreatment.details.recovery && (
⏰

Récupération

{selectedTreatment.details.recovery}

)} {selectedTreatment.details.followUp && (
📅

Suivi recommandé

{selectedTreatment.details.followUp}

)}
)}
)}
); }; export default Reservations;
